summary: High‑quality front‑of‑house (FOB) recording that captures an excellent psychedelic first set and a mixed second set, highlighted by Brent’s new keyboard‑driven song.
review: The recording is praised for its overall clarity despite a slightly tinny character and some vocal delay, typical of a front‑of‑house mix. Musically the first set shines with psychedelic energy, while the early part of the second set feels less inspired; Brent’s new song injects fresh excitement into the latter half.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave 4‑star ratings, noting a strong first set and decent recording quality with only minor tonal issues.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as great overall but a bit tinny and with noticeable vocal delay; soundboard (FOB) mix is generally clear and listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set praised for psychedelic vibe; second set’s pre‑drums section considered less inspired, while the later portion recovers with Brent’s new song and overall solid performance.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s new keyboard‑driven song is highlighted as a strong point of the show.
band_member_comments.Drums: Early second‑set (pre‑drums) described as less inspired.
